holiday_note: 2025-12-31 was a regular trading day with SIFMA-recommended 2pm ET early close. No holiday adjustment needed for US/UK/EU/JP markets.

curves.description: US Treasury constant-maturity yields on 2025-12-31. Used as the discount curve for USD reconciliation. Source: US Treasury H.15 via FRED, confirmed via Advisor Perspectives year-end snapshot.

quotes.note: Pull live from FRED at harness time

curves.description: SOFR OIS swap curve. Authoritative quotes (ICE Swap Rate) are paywalled. For this reconciliation we treat UST_CMT as the discount curve proxy; documented explicitly so downstream readers don't mistake this for a bank-quality SOFR discount curve.
curves.overnight_fixing_source: NY Fed reference rate; confirmed via @SOFRRate post 2026-01-02
curves.overnight_fixing_note: Year-end turn: 3.87% is elevated vs. normal range 3.70–4.00%. IORB was 3.65% (eff. 2025-12-11), SRF 3.75%.

historical_series_pull_instruction.purpose: Reconstruct the UST FRN and any SOFR-linked projected coupons

ois_swap_pull_instructions.alternative: Bootstrap from CME SOFR futures settlement prices (end-of-day free)
ois_swap_pull_instructions.decision_for_reconciliation: Use UST_CMT as discount curve. Both Convex and QuantLib get the same input, so reconciliation stays valid even if the curve isn't a true market OIS curve.

curves.description: UK Gilt nominal spot curve on 2025-12-31. Source: BoE 'GLC Nominal daily data_2025 to present.xlsx' inside https://www.bankofengland.co.uk/-/media/boe/files/statistics/yield-curves/glcnominalddata.zip (sheet '4. spot curve'). BoE publishes continuously-compounded spot yields; values stored here are converted to semi-annual (r_sa = 2·(exp(r_c/2)−1)) to match UST_CMT labelling.

overnight_fixing.expected_range: 3.72–3.73 (BoE Bank Rate held at 3.75% per Dec 18 2025 MPC)

curves.description: ECB euro-area AAA-rated government bond spot curve on 2025-12-31. Source: SDMX series YC.B.U2.EUR.4F.G_N_A.SV_C_YM.SR_<tenor> via https://data-api.ecb.europa.eu/service/data/YC/... ECB publishes continuously-compounded Svensson-model spot yields; values stored here are converted to semi-annual (r_sa = 2·(exp(r_c/2)−1)) for consistency with UST_CMT labelling. Used for EUR discount rather than the Bund-only curve because the AAA euro-area curve is the ECB's primary daily publication.

overnight_fixing.expected_range: 1.91–1.93 (ECB DFR held at 2.00% per Dec 18 2025 meeting; €STR typically 8-10bp below DFR)

curves.description: Japan Government Bond par yield curve on 2025-12-30 (Japanese markets closed 2025-12-31 for year-end holiday; last business day used). Source: MOF jgbcme_all.csv. MOF publishes daily par yields by fixed tenor; market convention is semi-annual compounding so values are stored as-is.

tips_index_ratio_pull_instruction.note: Index ratio on 2025-12-31 must be pulled at harness time. Index ratio at original issue was 1.00108.

known_limits: No free SOFR-OIS swap curve. UST_CMT used as discount-curve proxy.

UK Gilt + ECB AAA curves are ECB-/BoE-model spot yields (continuous) converted to semi-annual for consistency; not par yields. Use for relative comparison, not absolute price matching to Bloomberg YAS.
JGB curve is observed on 2025-12-30 (last business day before the Japanese year-end holiday).
7Y, 1M, 3M UST points missing from snapshot source; must be pulled from FRED at harness time.
TIPS index ratio, SOFR fixing series, and any FRN projection rely on live API pulls; not baked into this file.
